stemHtml: An aircraft is on the take-off roll with a valid clearance. A dangerous situation requires it to abort. What must the controller say?

options.a: BIGJET 192, TAKE-OFF CLEARANCE CANCELED, STOP IMMEDIATELY.
options.c: BIGJET 192, DISREGARD TAKE-OFF CLEARANCE, STOP NOW.
options.d: BIGJET 192, STOP IMMEDIATELY, BIGJET 192, STOP IMMEDIATELY.
